zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fortescue the Younger於1434年出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，他的父親Richard Fortescue29歲，母親Lady Alice de Windsor21歲。他於1463年之後與Lady Alice Boleyn在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾艾布林頓享年66歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fortescue the Younger于1434年出生在英国諾福爾可布利可林时，他的父亲Richard Fortescue29岁，母亲Lady Alice de Windsor21岁。他于1463年之后与Lady Alice Boleyn在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1500年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾艾布林頓享年66岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fortescue
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French fort ‘strong’ + escu ‘shield’.
History: A family of this name claim descent from Radulfus Fortescu who is recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holding lands at Modbury (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fortescue the Younger was born in 1434, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, his father, Richard Fortescue, was 29 and his mother, Lady Alice de Windsor, was 21. He married Lady Alice Boleyn after 1463, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1500, in Ebrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fortescue the Younger est né en 1434, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Fortescue, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Windsor, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Boleyn après 1463, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1500, à Ebrington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fortescue the Younger 1434 in Blickling, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Fortescue 29 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Windsor 21. Er hat nach 1463 in Norfolk, England Lady Alice Boleyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Ebrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fortescue the Younger è nato il nel 1434 nel Blickling, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Fortescue, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Windsor, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Boleyn dopo il 1463, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Ebrington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fortescue the Youngerが1434年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングで生まれた時，父Richard Fortescueは29歳，母Lady Alice de Windsorは21歳であった。1463年以後にイギリスノーフォルクでLady Alice Boleynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエブリントンで66歳で死去し，パキスタンآزاد جموں و کشمیرブリaルにて埋葬された。

ko.Burial Details Unknown: 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a
ko.lifeSummary: John Fortescue the Younger(이)가 1434년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Fortescue(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Windsor(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1463년 이후 영국 노르폴크에서 Lady Alice Boleyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브링턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fortescue the Younger nasceu em 1434, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Fortescue, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Windsor, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Boleyn após 1463, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1500, em Ebrington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.Burial Details Unknown: буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fortescue the Younger родился в 1434 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Fortescue было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Windsor, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Boleyn после 1463 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1500 г. в местности эбрингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fortescue the Younger nació en 1434, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Fortescue, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Windsor, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Boleyn después de 1463, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Ebrington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
